title: Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels
posterAlt: Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels (1998) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A card shark and his unwillingly-enlisted friends need to make a lot of cash quick after losing a sketchy poker match. To do this they decide to pull a heist on a small-time gang who happen to be operating out of the flat next door.
synopsis: Released in 1998, Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels is a comedy and crime film from United Kingdom and United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. A standout of 1990s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
